Article Title: NFL Trade Rumors: Chicago Bears and Dallas Cowboys could pursue the $123 million Steelers linebacker
Article Text:
NFL Trade Rumors: Chicago Bears and Dallas Cowboys could pursue $123 million Steelers linebacker (Getty)

NFL trade rumors: Steelers’ contract puzzle could push T.J. Watt into the Chicago Bears and Dallas Cowboys discussion



The Pittsburgh Steelers may have a major decision waiting after the 2026 season, and several teams already appear interested in how it unfolds. Star edge rusher T. J. Watt continues to draw attention around the league as questions grow about Pittsburgh’s long-term plans with its crowded pass-rush group.That is where the Chicago Bears and Dallas Cowboys enter the picture. Both teams need another proven game-changer on defense, and recent reports suggest Watt could become one of the biggest names tied to NFL trade rumors over the next year.The latest buzz started after ESPN insider Jeremy Fowler reported that teams around the league are watching Pittsburgh’s edge-rusher situation closely. The Steelers already pay Alex Highsmith big money, while younger pass rusher Nick Herbig is expected to command a major extension soon.Fowler explained that keeping all three edge rushers may not be realistic financially. He noted that Watt turns 32 in October and still carries guaranteed salaries of $32 million in both 2026 and 2027. Fowler wrote on ESPN that some teams believe Pittsburgh could at least consider moving on from Watt if it commits long-term to Herbig.“To the point above: If the Steelers end up signing Herbig long term, having three large contracts allocated to one position is a tough proposition,” Fowler wrote.“Watt, for all his greatness, turns 32 in October and has guaranteed salaries of $32 million in both 2026 and 2027. Watt is a legacy player, something Pittsburgh values more than most. But some teams could see Pittsburgh at least considering moving on from him.That instantly sparked trade rumors involving several contenders. The Bears stand out because their pass rush struggled badly last season. Chicago finished near the bottom of the league in pass-rush win rate, and the front office made only modest changes up front. Pairing Watt with Montez Sweat would immediately give defensive coordinator Dennis Allen one of the NFL’s toughest edge duos.The Chicago Bears also have future cap flexibility. According to OverTheCap, the Bears project to have a massive spending room by 2028, which makes a high-profile move possible if Pittsburgh opens the door.Meanwhile, the Dallas Cowboys continue searching for another elite defender opposite Micah Parsons. Dallas reportedly explored several defensive upgrades over the last year, and Watt would fit perfectly into a win-now roster built around quarterback Dak Prescott.There is still no indication that the Steelers want to trade TJ Watt today. He remains one of the faces of the franchise and a future Hall of Fame candidate. Still, as contract pressure builds and Herbig’s next deal approaches, teams like the Chicago Bears and the Dallas Cowboys have every reason to keep watching closely.
Article Summary: T.J. Watt could become one of the biggest names tied to NFL trade rumors over the next year. ESPN insider Jeremy Fowler reported that teams around the league are watching Pittsburgh’s edge-rusher situation closely. The Steelers already pay Alex Highsmith big money, while younger pass rusher Nick Herbig is expected to command a major extension.

Article Title: Dak Prescott spotted with Sarah Jane Ramos' bridesmaid at PBR event, ex-fiancée reacts with Drake post
Article Text:
Sarah Jane Ramos breaks silence after Dak Prescott seen spending time with her former bridesmaid in public (Getty Images)

Was Dak Prescott dating Sarah Jane Ramos' Bridesmaid at the PBR event ?



Two months after calling off their Italy wedding, Dallas Cowboys quarterback Dak Prescott 's personal life is back in the headlines. On Friday night, Prescott attended a Pro Bull Riders event in Fort Worth, Texas, alongside Caitlin Rance, a close friend of his ex-fiancée Sarah Jane Ramos who was set to be a bridesmaid at their cancelled wedding. Eyewitnesses said the two looked like more than friends. Prescott flatly denied it.While those involved insist nothing romantic is happening, the timing and optics quickly fueled speculation online, especially after Ramos appeared to answer the situation with a pointed social media post later that same day.The latest attention around Dak Prescott’s personal life did not come from a formal statement or interview. Instead, it came through a subtle Instagram story that many interpreted as a direct response to the TMZ report.After news surfaced that Prescott attended the PBR event with Caitlin Rance, Sarah Jane Ramos shared a screenshot of Drake ’s song “Firm Friends” from the album Iceman. The caption read, “Scorpio king 🤏🏾,” but the real focus quickly shifted to the song choice itself.“Firm Friends” centers on fractured relationships and betrayal between people who were once trusted.That immediately caught attention given the circumstances surrounding Prescott and Rance. The post arrived the same day the outing became public, making it difficult for fans not to connect the dots.The breakup between Prescott and Ramos had already generated heavy discussion in recent months. Reports claimed the relationship ended after Ramos learned Prescott was still communicating with multiple women from his past. Those reports also described “ongoing infidelity issues” that had reportedly strained the relationship long before the final split.Now, the appearance with someone closely tied to Ramos has intensified scrutiny around Prescott’s off-field decisions. TMZ reported that Prescott and Rance described themselves as “just friends,” though eyewitnesses at the event reportedly believed the interaction appeared more personal. The situation gained even more attention when Rance allegedly handed the phone to Prescott after TMZ contacted her for comment.For Prescott, none of this changes the expectations awaiting him in Dallas entering the upcoming NFL season. But public perception around star athletes rarely stays separated from personal controversy, especially when social media continues adding new layers to an already complicated story.At this point, neither Prescott nor Ramos has publicly addressed the situation in detail. Still, each new development continues to keep the story alive far beyond celebrity gossip circles and deep into NFL conversation spaces.
Article Summary: Dak Prescott attended a PBR event with Caitlin Rance, a close friend of his ex- fiancée Sarah Jane Ramos who was set to be a bridesmaid at their cancelled wedding. TMZ reported that Prescott and Rance described themselves as “just friends,” though eyewitnesses at the event reportedly believed the interaction appeared more personal. Ramos appeared to answer the situation with a pointed social media post.

Article Title: The $13.2M Cowboys first-round pick nobody talks about anymore - and why he urgently needs a reset
Article Text:
$13.2 million Cowboys first-round pick faces mounting pressure as calls for career reboot grow louder (Getty Images)

Why do NFL analysts believe Mazi Smith needs a career reboot?

The Dallas Cowboys spent the better part of the last year trying to fix a problem they created themselves. Trading for two Pro Bowl defensive tackles in consecutive seasons, first Kenny Clark and later Quinnen Williams, was less about adding luxury pieces and more about repairing a failed investment. That decision traces directly back to Mazi Smith, the Cowboys’ 2023 first-round pick who never became the anchor Dallas believed it drafted. Now with the New York Jets after last season’s blockbuster trade, Smith enters 2026 carrying a label no young player wants attached to his name: reclamation project.Mazi Smith’s move to New York was overshadowed by the Cowboys landing Williams, but his inclusion in the deal quietly closed a disappointing chapter in Dallas. Two years after being drafted to strengthen the run defense, Smith left with more questions than production.Bleacher Report’s Brent Sobleski recently placed Smith among NFL players most in need of a fresh start, pointing to the disconnect between his athletic profile and his on-field development.“Mazi Smith’s potential is built upon an obvious contradiction,” Sobleski wrote. “The 6’3″, 323-pound defensive lineman is an elite athlete.At the same time, he’s a poor technician. One negates the other … it now falls on the Jets’ staff to ensure the nose tackle can realize some of his immense upside.”Sobleski’s assessment cuts directly to the issue that followed Smith in Dallas. Coaches never questioned his physical tools. The concern was whether he could consistently translate those traits into disciplined, winning snaps in the trenches. Even during stretches when Dallas desperately needed help against the run, Smith struggled to secure a reliable role.The Jets do not appear fully convinced either. Before the May 1 deadline, New York declined Smith’s fifth-year option, effectively turning 2026 into a prove-it season. ESPN’s Rich Cimini reported, “The Jets declined to exercise the fifth-year option for DT Mazi Smith, whom they acquired from Dallas in the Quinnen Williams trade. Smith, who played only three games (54 snaps) for the Jets last season, is under contract for the coming season. He will be a free agent in 2027.”That decision spoke loudly. Teams rarely give up early on former first-round defensive linemen unless doubts already exist internally.The criticism surrounding Smith has also become sharper with time. Bleacher Report’s Matt Holder previously called him the Cowboys’ “Worst First Round Pick” of the last five years, highlighting poor run-defense grades and stalled development. The numbers backed it up. Smith’s 34.7 Pro Football Focus grade in 2024 ranked near the bottom of NFL defensive tackles, another reminder of how far expectations have fallen since draft night.Still, the Jets may offer Smith his clearest path forward. New York’s defensive front is already loaded with proven talent, meaning he no longer has to justify his draft status every week. If he can narrow his focus to controlling space, playing lower and handling the dirty work inside, the career reboot analysts keep mentioning may still be possible.
Article Summary: Mazi Smith was the Cowboys' 2023 first-round pick. He never became the anchor Dallas believed it drafted. Now with the New York Jets after last season’s blockbuster trade, Smith enters 2026 carrying a label no young player wants attached to his name.

Article Title: Bill Belichick’s girlfriend Jordon Hudson questions why major sports media outlets continue ignoring the Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini scandal
Article Text:
Jordon Hudson on Mike Vrabel-Dianna Russini scandal. (Getty Images)

Why is Jordon Hudson accusing NFL media of double standards?

Jordon Hudson, the girlfriend of former New England Patriots head coach Bill Belichick, has publicly called out major sports media outlets for what she considers uneven coverage of the Mike Vrabel-Dianna Russini scandal. Since the New York Post published photos of the pair in April, networks like ESPN and NBC have largely sidestepped the story. Hudson has repeatedly highlighted what she sees as a glaring contrast with how her own relationship with Belichick was handled by the press.Sports host Tony Farmer recently compiled a video montage showing various media personalities declining to discuss the situation, including clips from ESPN and Boston's 98.5 The Sports Hub. Hudson reposted it on X, not for the first time."A montage of people in the media being awkward about covering the Mike Vrabel-Dianna Russini story. Compare this to coverage of the Coldplay couple, Bill Belichick-Jordon Hudson, Ime Udoka, Rex Ryan, and Sherrone Moore. What is going on?" Farmer wrote.The contrast she is pointing to is difficult to ignore. When Hudson's relationship with Belichick became public last offseason, the coverage was relentless.Reports surfaced about her being copied on Belichick's official University of North Carolina emails and being involved in managing parts of his schedule. There were even stories about her building a real estate portfolio worth close to $8 million.Yet, when photos emerged of Vrabel and Russini together, the same newsrooms that had devoted significant airtime to Belichick and Hudson went unusually quiet. Hudson directly called out Pro Football Talk, writing: "We're not talking about this? Why not, @ProFootballTalk?" She has also taken aim at The Athletic, where Russini worked most recently before resigning.What makes the comparison sharper is that Russini previously worked at ESPN, the very network now staying largely silent, and the alleged affair reportedly occurred during that time there.Neither Vrabel nor Dianna Russini has publicly addressed the allegations. ESPN has not indicated whether it plans to review any reporting Russini produced while covering Vrabel. Meanwhile, Vrabel has sought counseling and continues as Patriots head coach, and Belichick is still at the helm in North Carolina.Whether the media's restraint reflects bias, legal caution, or something else entirely, Hudson is not letting it go unnoticed.
Article Summary: Jordon Hudson is the girlfriend of former New England Patriots head coach Bill Belichick. Since the New York Post published photos of the pair in April, networks have largely sidestepped the story. Hudson has repeatedly highlighted what she sees as a glaring contrast with how her own relationship with Belichick was handled by the press.

Article Title: "He’s a really good human being": NFL insider Albert Breer makes strong Mike Vrabel claim while addressing his link to Dianna Russini controversy
Article Text:
Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini (Getty Images)

What did Albert Breer say about Mike Vrabel regarding Dianna Russini saga?

Mike Vrabel has stayed almost entirely out of public view since early April, but the conversation around him has only grown louder. The New England Patriots head coach has avoided interviews while speculation surrounding his reported connection to former NFL insider Dianna Russini continues to dominate online discussion. Photos, leaked documents, and social media reactions have kept the story alive through the offseason. On Friday, though, longtime NFL reporter Albert Breer offered something missing from much of the coverage so far: a direct personal defense of Vrabel’s character from someone who has known him for nearly 20 years.Albert Breer’s comments came during an appearance on The Dan Patrick Show, where he addressed the mounting attention surrounding Mike Vrabel without dismissing the seriousness of the situation. Having covered Vrabel during his playing days in New England, Breer leaned on personal experience rather than internet speculation.“Mike’s a logical guy. Mike’s a really smart guy,” Breer said. “I think Mike, deep down, is a really good guy. You know, I really believe that. I’ve known him since he was a player. I think it’s, he’s a really good human being, you know, like at his core.”That perspective stood out because most of the conversation over the past several weeks has centered on viral photos, rumors, and online reactions instead of firsthand accounts from people who actually know Vrabel personally.Breer did not argue that the controversy should disappear. What he pushed back on was the idea that the public narrative should completely define the man at the center of it.Still, Breer also made clear that silence will not remain an option forever. Once training camp begins, the questions waiting for Vrabel are unlikely to fade.“I think it becomes the elephant in the room if you don’t address it,” Breer said. “And then I think the other piece of it is just kind of like if you want to keep it in a football context, it is relatively easy. Like, how did this affect the way that you did your job in April, May, and June? And how did it affect your relationship with your players?”Mike Vrabel has largely avoided public comment beyond an earlier statement acknowledging difficult conversations within his family. Russini has not spoken publicly since leaving The Athletic on April 14. Meanwhile, reports involving a 2021 Tennessee boat rental and older New York photos continued fueling debate throughout the NFL offseason.For now, Vrabel remains in charge of the Patriots. But once the regular season approaches, attention will quickly shift from speculation online to how he handles the spotlight in front of cameras and players alike. The Sept. 9 opener against the Seattle Seahawks may become the first real test of whether the story finally quiets down or follows him into the season.
Article Summary: NFL reporter Albert Breer has known Mike Vrabel for nearly 20 years. Breer says he believes the New England Patriots head coach is a "really good guy" Breer did not dismiss the seriousness of the situation, saying it will not disappear once training camp begins.

Article Title: Dianna Russini’s and Mike Vrabel's resurfaced video fuels another ugly chapter in Mike Vrabel scandal
Article Text:
Dianna Russini found herself trending again after an old Mother’s Day video resurfaced online amid the ongoing controversy involving Mike Vrabel. The clip, captioned “Because nothing screams Happy Mother's Day more than posting thirst traps,” quickly went viral and reportedly crossed 1.3 million views within hours. Fans flooded social media with reactions as the NFL world continued obsessing over every development connected to the Russini-Vrabel scandal.

Dianna Russini Mother’s Day video explodes online amid Mike Vrabel controversy

Mike Vrabel scandal continues dominating NFL social media conversation

Dianna Russini is once again at the center of intense online discussion after an old Mother’s Day video unexpectedly resurfaced during the ongoing controversy involving Mike Vrabel. What began as another ordinary social media throwback quickly turned into viral NFL gossip after fans connected the clip to the wider scandal that has dominated headlines for weeks.The resurfaced video spread rapidly across X late Friday night after being reposted by MLFootball. Within hours, it reportedly crossed more than 1.3 million views, with users flooding comment sections with reactions, jokes, criticism, and speculation about Russini’s recent public appearances.The old clip gained traction largely because of its caption, which read: “Because nothing screams Happy Mother's Day more than posting thirst traps.”That single line instantly reignited conversations surrounding Russini’s personal life and the controversy linked to Vrabel. The timing of the resurfaced post also drew attention because it came only days after Russini and her husband, Kevin Goldschmidt, were photographed publicly together for the first time since the scandal broke.The pair were reportedly seen outside their home on Mother’s Day sharing a kiss while spending time with family. Those photos had already triggered heavy debate online, with many social media users questioning whether the appearance was an intentional response to growing public scrutiny.At the same time, discussion surrounding Russini’s professional future continues building momentum across NFL circles. The former senior NFL insider stepped away from her position at The Athletic following weeks of viral speculation tied to photos involving Vrabel at an Arizona resort earlier this year.Both Russini and Vrabel have denied wrongdoing since the controversy erupted.Despite the NFL offseason featuring major storylines involving schedules, trades, and quarterback battles, the Russini-Vrabel controversy continues to dominate social media engagement across football platforms.Almost every image, interview clip and public appearance has been dissected by fans online to resurface connected to either figure. Some stood up for Russini, saying people shouldn’t be using her old social media posts against her during such a difficult time in the public eye. Others condemned the renewed attention, saying the internet response was over-the-top and intrusive.Yet the viral success of the Mother’s Day clip illustrated just how closely the online audience is monitoring every development in the story.Meanwhile, Vrabel remains under pressure as questions continue to swirl about how the controversy could affect public perception ahead of the upcoming NFL season. There has been no word on any league discipline but the situation has become one of the most talked about NFL off-field stories of 2026.But for now, even videos that are years old are enough to trigger another wave of viral reactions. And with millions still interacting with every new development online, the controversy surrounding Russini and Vrabel does not appear to be slowing down.
Article Summary: Dianna Russini trending again after an old Mother’s Day video resurfaced online amid the ongoing controversy involving Mike Vrabel. The clip, captioned “Because nothing screams Happy Mother's Day more than posting thirst traps,” quickly went viral and reportedly crossed 1.3 million views within hours.

Article Title: “They don’t understand that about you”: Hailee Steinfeld breaks silence on the dark side of postpartum as Josh Allen stands by her side
Article Text:
Hailee Steinfeld breaks silence on the dark side of postpartum as Josh Allen stands by her side. (Image via Getty Images)

Hailee Steinfeld opens up about motherhood and how it has affected her body as Josh Allen stands by her side



Hailee Steinfeld and Josh Allen prefer to stay private as they embrace parenthood together



The Buffalo Bills’ star player, Josh Allen, and his wife, the BAFTA nominated actress Hailee Steinfeld, seem overjoyed as they recently welcomed a daughter together.While both Josh Allen and Hailee Steinfeld have been strictly private about their daughter and have stayed away from making her pictures or name public, the “Sinners” actress recently opened up about how she has been feeling postpartum.A few hours ago, in her popular newsletter Beau Society, the “True Grit” actress Hailee Steinfeld wrote about how she has been spending her time reading the Heng Ou, Amely Greeven and Marisa Belger’s book The First 40 Days.Hailee Steinfeld wrote, “There’s a paragraph early on that talks about how even forty days after giving birth, you’re still in such a vulnerable state…”The BAFTA nominated actress added, “People understand that about your new baby, but they don’t understand that about you, the mom.”Hailee Steinfeld continued, “I’m still in this early period and need to remember to be super gentle with myself in every way — physically, mentally, nutritionally, spiritually, all of it.”The renowned actress added, “My body has gone through a lot of change recently, so I’m taking it slow while I figure out what my workout routine will look like moving forward…”Millions of fans were also expecting Hailee Steinfeld and her husband, the Buffalo Bills’ star quarterback Josh Allen to turn heads at the MET Gala, earlier this month.But it seems both of them are focused on being there for their daughter as they try to stay out of the spotlight for now.The Buffalo Bills’ star player has also been focused on embracing parenthood with his wife as he gears up for the upcoming season.While Josh Allen has been a force to be reckoned with on the field, many were expecting the team to win the championship last year.For now, all eyes are on how the Buffalo Bills performs in the next season as Josh Allen is set to bounce back on the field.
Article Summary: The Buffalo Bills’ star player, Josh Allen, and his wife, the BAFTA nominated actress Hailee Steinfeld, seem overjoyed as they recently welcomed a daughter together. The “Sinners” actress recently opened up about how she has been feeling postpartum.

Article Summary: Fans flooded social media with jokes, panic, and wedding theories following Swift’s fourth public NYC outing in one week. Comments like “I AM SCARED NOW” and “She is 100% deterring us from that wedding” went viral.
